title: Process vs thread simulation
summary: Contrast isolated process address spaces with threads sharing the heap — the foundation for why concurrency bugs and scaling models differ.

title: Context switching cost
summary: See CPU time spent switching between tasks — ties to tail latency when you over-subscribe threads or overload a core.

title: Stack vs heap
summary: Allocate and watch stack frames grow versus heap blocks — intuition for lifetimes, limits, and escape-style behavior.

title: Memory leak simulator
summary: Objects never reclaimed — gradual exhaustion in a long-running service (think Python/Node heap growth).

title: Virtual memory & paging
summary: RAM vs disk, page faults and swaps — why the machine “grinds” under memory pressure.

title: CPU scheduling algorithms
summary: FIFO, round robin, weighted fairness — task timelines and who starves when.

title: Queue system simulation
summary: Incoming work, a worker pool, and backpressure — same mental model as queues, SQS-style buffers, and rate limits.

title: Deadlock simulator
summary: Resources, locks, and circular wait — visualize a freeze before it happens in production.

title: File tree explorer
summary: Directories, files, and relationships — how a path resolves before bytes move.

title: Read/write & latency
summary: Simulated disk access patterns and latency — ties to logging throughput and pipeline bottlenecks.

title: Pipe system
summary: Chain processes: data flows like `cat → grep → sort` — same idea as streaming and ETL stages.

title: Process tree & jobs
summary: Parent/child relationships and background jobs — how shells compose real workloads.

title: File descriptors & redirection
summary: stdout, stderr, and redirection — what actually happens when you `2>&1` or append to a file.

title: Shell pipeline builder
summary: Assemble multi-step flows from primitives — mirrors CI/CD and automation scripts.

title: Why your API breaks under load
summary: Thread-per-request vs queue + workers under a burst — latency, failures, and exhaustion side by side.
